metadata.title: States PCS: Andhra Pradesh GK For APPSC Examinations

questions.question: Which species of parakeet is predominantly used in Parrot astrology practiced in Andhra Pradesh?
questions.explanation: Alexandrine and rose-ringed parakeets are trained for Parrot astrology in Andhra Pradesh; Alexandrine is commonly used.

questions.question: Which refinery in Andhra Pradesh, commissioned in 1957, is currently undergoing the Visakh Refinery Modernisation Project to increase its capacity and produce BS-VI compliant fuels?
questions.explanation: Visakhapatnam Refinery, commissioned in 1957, is undergoing the Visakh Refinery Modernisation Project to increase capacity to 15 MTPA and produce BS-VI fuels.

questions.question: Who was the Andhra poet and freedom fighter from Srikakulam district known for the patriotic song Maakoddee Telladoratanamu?
questions.explanation: Garimella Satyanarayana (1893-1952) was a poet and freedom fighter from Srikakulam, famous for Maakoddee Telladoratanamu and jailed for anti-British songs.

questions.question: Which traditional game of Andhra Pradesh is also known as Satoliya?
questions.explanation: Satoliya is the local name for the game Seven Stones in Andhra Pradesh.

questions.question: Who was the founder of the Golconda Sultanate?
questions.explanation: Golconda Sultanate was founded in 1518 by Quli Qutb Shah of the Turkoman Qutb Shahi dynasty.

questions.question: Which British Viceroy’s grain export policies exacerbated the Great Famine of 1876-78 in British India?
questions.explanation: Lord Lytton’s grain export policies worsened the 1876-78 famine, leading to millions of deaths and minimal relief efforts under Sir Richard Temple.

questions.question: To which larger community group does the Kanchari community of Andhra Pradesh belong?
questions.explanation: Kanchari is a bronze-making community classified under the Vishwakarma group in Andhra Pradesh.

questions.question: Who was the founder and General Secretary of the All India Muslim League in 1906?
questions.explanation: Viqar-ul-Mulk was a founder and General Secretary of the All India Muslim League in 1906 and played a key role in Muslim political mobilization and the Aligarh Movement.

questions.question: Who is the Indian-origin aerospace engineer renowned for designing the Rao’s nozzle, a widely used optimum thrust rocket nozzle?
questions.explanation: Gadicharla V.R. Rao developed the Rao’s nozzle, a standard rocket nozzle design used globally in aerospace engineering.

questions.question: In which city of Andhra Pradesh was Padmasree Warrior born?
questions.explanation: Padmasree Warrior was born in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh.
